name: taches-principled
description: Principle-based plugin ecosystem for Claude Code — planning, execution, evaluation, and development skills.

plugins.name: taches-principled
plugins.description: Principle-based Claude Code plugin for the full development lifecycle — planning, execution, authoring, code review, root-cause analysis, continuous improvement, ideation, spec-driven development, documentation, code refinement, multi-agent patterns, tool design, security auditing, and test strategy.

plugins.name: tp-sadd
plugins.description: Structured agent-driven development with multi-pattern evaluation — judge, sequential, parallel, competitive, and tree-of-thoughts execution with meta-judge verification.

plugins.name: tp-fpf
plugins.description: First Principles Framework — structured reasoning with hypothesis generation, evidence validation, and auditable decision records.

plugins.name: tp-git
plugins.description: Git workflow automation — conventional commits, PR creation, issue analysis, git notes, worktrees, and inline PR review comments.

plugins.name: tp-tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development — write tests first, watch them fail, implement to pass. Add post-hoc test coverage for existing code. Fix broken tests after refactoring with verification.

plugins.name: tp-ddd
plugins.description: DDD development practices — code-transparency (visible behavior), code-architecture (layered structure), and code-quality (domain naming, typed errors). 3 discoverable skills answering: what does it do, how to structure, is it idiomatic.

plugins.name: tp-force-multiplier
plugins.description: Hook-driven coaching plugin that steers Claude to use subagents and skills more — observes behavior patterns and surfaces immediate coaching hints.

plugins.name: tp-vps-governance
plugins.description: VPS governance for Claude Code — config auditing and memory curation.

plugins.name: tp-meta
plugins.description: Session meta-review and behavioral analysis — parse transcripts, diagnose anti-patterns, investigate root causes, and create GitHub issues from findings.
